docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $160.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT ADOBE ROOFING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ADOBE ROOFING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADOBE ROOFING $160.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
